TestCase.name: testCoalesceOnFullJoinNotSimplified
TestCase.Resource: SELECT COALESCE(b.order_id, a.order_id) AS order_id FROM orders a FULL JOIN order_details b ON a.order_id = b.order_id

LogicalProject(order_id=[COALESCE($3, $0)]) +- LogicalJoin(condition=[=($0, $3)], joinType=[full]) :- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, orders]]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, order_details]])

Calc(select=[COALESCE(order_id0, order_id) AS order_id]) +- Join(joinType=[FullOuterJoin], where=[=(order_id, order_id0)], select=[order_id, order_id0], leftInputSpec=[JoinKeyContainsUniqueKey], rightInputSpec=[JoinKeyContainsUniqueKey]) :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[order_id]]) : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, orders, project=[order_id], metadata=[]]], fields=[order_id]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[order_id]]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, order_details, project=[order_id], metadata=[]]], fields=[order_id])

TestCase.name: testCoalesceOnInnerJoinEquiKey
TestCase.Resource: SELECT COALESCE(b.order_id, a.order_id) AS order_id FROM orders a INNER JOIN order_details b ON a.order_id = b.order_id

LogicalProject(order_id=[$3]) +- LogicalJoin(condition=[=($0, $3)], joinType=[inner]) :- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, orders]]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, order_details]])

Calc(select=[order_id0 AS order_id]) +- Join(joinType=[InnerJoin], where=[=(order_id, order_id0)], select=[order_id, order_id0], leftInputSpec=[JoinKeyContainsUniqueKey], rightInputSpec=[JoinKeyContainsUniqueKey]) :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[order_id]]) : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, orders, project=[order_id], metadata=[]]], fields=[order_id]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[order_id]]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, order_details, project=[order_id], metadata=[]]], fields=[order_id])

TestCase.name: testCoalesceOnLeftJoinEquiKey
TestCase.Resource: SELECT COALESCE(b.order_id, a.order_id) AS order_id, a.amount FROM orders a LEFT JOIN order_details b ON a.order_id = b.order_id

LogicalProject(order_id=[COALESCE($3, $0)], amount=[$2]) +- LogicalJoin(condition=[=($0, $3)], joinType=[left]) :- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, orders]]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, order_details]])
TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, orders, project=[order_id, amount], metadata=[]]], fields=[order_id, amount])

TestCase.name: testCoalesceOnNestedRowScalarField
TestCase.Resource: SELECT CAST(COALESCE(b.r.order_id, a.order_id) AS STRING) AS order_id_str FROM orders a LEFT JOIN order_details_row b ON a.order_id = b.r.order_id

LogicalProject(order_id_str=[CAST(COALESCE($3.order_id, $0)):VARCHAR(2147483647) CHARACTER SET "UTF-16LE" NOT NULL]) +- LogicalProject(order_id=[$0], user_id=[$1], amount=[$2], r=[$3], detail=[$4]) +- LogicalJoin(condition=[=($0, $5)], joinType=[left]) :- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, orders]]) +- LogicalProject(r=[$0], detail=[$1], $f2=[$0.order_id]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, order_details_row]])

Calc(select=[CAST(COALESCE(r.order_id, order_id) AS VARCHAR(2147483647)) AS order_id_str]) +- Join(joinType=[LeftOuterJoin], where=[=(order_id, $f2)], select=[order_id, r, $f2], leftInputSpec=[JoinKeyContainsUniqueKey], rightInputSpec=[HasUniqueKey]) :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[order_id]]) : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, orders, project=[order_id], metadata=[]]], fields=[order_id]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[$f2]]) +- Calc(select=[r, r.order_id AS $f2]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, order_details_row, project=[r], metadata=[]]], fields=[r])

TestCase.name: testCoalesceOnNonEquiColumnsNotSimplified
TestCase.Resource: SELECT COALESCE(b.detail, CAST(a.amount AS STRING)) AS val FROM orders a LEFT JOIN order_details b ON a.order_id = b.order_id

LogicalProject(val=[COALESCE($4, CAST($2):VARCHAR(2147483647) CHARACTER SET "UTF-16LE")]) +- LogicalJoin(condition=[=($0, $3)], joinType=[left]) :- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, orders]]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, order_details]])

Calc(select=[COALESCE(detail, CAST(amount AS VARCHAR(2147483647))) AS val]) +- Join(joinType=[LeftOuterJoin], where=[=(order_id, order_id0)], select=[order_id, amount, order_id0, detail], leftInputSpec=[JoinKeyContainsUniqueKey], rightInputSpec=[JoinKeyContainsUniqueKey]) :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[order_id]]) : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, orders, project=[order_id, amount], metadata=[]]], fields=[order_id, amount]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[order_id]]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, order_details]], fields=[order_id, detail])

TestCase.name: testCoalesceOnRightJoinEquiKey
TestCase.Resource: SELECT COALESCE(a.order_id, b.order_id) AS order_id FROM orders a RIGHT JOIN order_details b ON a.order_id = b.order_id

LogicalProject(order_id=[COALESCE($0, $3)]) +- LogicalJoin(condition=[=($0, $3)], joinType=[right]) :- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, orders]]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, order_details]])
TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, order_details, project=[order_id], metadata=[]]], fields=[order_id])

TestCase.name: testCoalesceReversedArgsOnLeftJoin
TestCase.Resource: SELECT COALESCE(a.order_id, b.order_id) AS order_id, a.amount FROM orders a LEFT JOIN order_details b ON a.order_id = b.order_id

LogicalProject(order_id=[$0], amount=[$2]) +- LogicalJoin(condition=[=($0, $3)], joinType=[left]) :- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, orders]]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, order_details]])
TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, orders, project=[order_id, amount], metadata=[]]], fields=[order_id, amount])

TestCase.name: testCoalesceThreeArgsAdjacentPair
TestCase.Resource: SELECT COALESCE(b.order_id, a.order_id, a.user_id) AS val FROM orders a LEFT JOIN order_details b ON a.order_id = b.order_id

LogicalProject(val=[COALESCE($3, $0)]) +- LogicalJoin(condition=[=($0, $3)], joinType=[left]) :- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, orders]]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, order_details]])
TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, orders, project=[order_id], metadata=[]]], fields=[order_id])

TestCase.name: testCoalesceThreeArgsInnerJoin
TestCase.Resource: SELECT COALESCE(a.user_id, b.order_id, a.order_id) AS val FROM orders a INNER JOIN order_details b ON a.order_id = b.order_id

LogicalProject(val=[$1]) +- LogicalJoin(condition=[=($0, $3)], joinType=[inner]) :- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, orders]]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, order_details]])

Calc(select=[user_id AS val]) +- Join(joinType=[InnerJoin], where=[=(order_id, order_id0)], select=[order_id, user_id, order_id0], leftInputSpec=[JoinKeyContainsUniqueKey], rightInputSpec=[JoinKeyContainsUniqueKey]) :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[order_id]]) : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, orders, project=[order_id, user_id], metadata=[]]], fields=[order_id, user_id]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[order_id]]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, order_details, project=[order_id], metadata=[]]], fields=[order_id])

TestCase.name: testCoalesceThreeArgsNonPreservedAfterPreserved
TestCase.Resource: SELECT COALESCE(a.user_id, a.order_id, b.order_id) AS val FROM orders a LEFT JOIN order_details b ON a.order_id = b.order_id

LogicalProject(val=[$1]) +- LogicalJoin(condition=[=($0, $3)], joinType=[left]) :- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, orders]]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, order_details]])
TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, orders, project=[user_id], metadata=[]]], fields=[user_id])

TestCase.name: testCoalesceThreeArgsNonPreservedBeforeWithGapNotSimplified
TestCase.Resource: SELECT COALESCE(b.order_id, a.user_id, a.order_id) AS val FROM orders a LEFT JOIN order_details b ON a.order_id = b.order_id

LogicalProject(val=[COALESCE($3, $1)]) +- LogicalJoin(condition=[=($0, $3)], joinType=[left]) :- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, orders]]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, order_details]])

Calc(select=[COALESCE(order_id0, user_id) AS val]) +- Join(joinType=[LeftOuterJoin], where=[=(order_id, order_id0)], select=[order_id, user_id, order_id0], leftInputSpec=[JoinKeyContainsUniqueKey], rightInputSpec=[JoinKeyContainsUniqueKey]) :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[order_id]]) : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, orders, project=[order_id, user_id], metadata=[]]], fields=[order_id, user_id]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[order_id]]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, order_details, project=[order_id], metadata=[]]], fields=[order_id])

TestCase.name: testCoalesceWithThreeArgs
TestCase.Resource: SELECT COALESCE(b.order_id, a.order_id, 0) AS order_id FROM orders a LEFT JOIN order_details b ON a.order_id = b.order_id

LogicalProject(order_id=[COALESCE($3, $0)]) +- LogicalJoin(condition=[=($0, $3)], joinType=[left]) :- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, orders]]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, order_details]])
TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, orders, project=[order_id], metadata=[]]], fields=[order_id])

TestCase.name: testCoalesceWrappedInCast
TestCase.Resource: SELECT CAST(COALESCE(b.order_id, a.order_id) AS STRING) AS order_id_str FROM orders a LEFT JOIN order_details b ON a.order_id = b.order_id

LogicalProject(order_id_str=[CAST(COALESCE($3, $0)):VARCHAR(2147483647) CHARACTER SET "UTF-16LE" NOT NULL]) +- LogicalJoin(condition=[=($0, $3)], joinType=[left]) :- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, orders]]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, order_details]])
Calc(select=[CAST(order_id AS VARCHAR(2147483647)) AS order_id_str]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, orders, project=[order_id], metadata=[]]], fields=[order_id])

TestCase.name: testMultipleCoalesceOnCompositeKey
TestCase.Resource: SELECT COALESCE(b.k1, a.k1) AS k1, COALESCE(b.k2, a.k2) AS k2, a.val FROM composite_key_table a LEFT JOIN composite_key_details b ON a.k1 = b.k1 AND a.k2 = b.k2

LogicalProject(k1=[COALESCE($3, $0)], k2=[COALESCE($4, $1)], val=[$2]) +- LogicalJoin(condition=[AND(=($0, $3), =($1, $4))], joinType=[left]) :- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, composite_key_table]]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, composite_key_details]])
TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, composite_key_table]], fields=[k1, k2, val])
